message.content:
Search for background check email template files in D:/cursor-projects/hr. Look for files related to "背调" (background check) email templates, particularly ones that contain email HTML/blade templates. Search in both hr-server and hr-frontend directories. Look for:
1. Blade templates or HTML files with "背调" or "background check" related content
2. Files containing "背调核实" text
3. Files containing the text "再次感谢您对我们工作的支持" 
4. Any email template files related to background checks

Be thorough - check blade templates, vue components, and any mail-related directories.
